CustomField.description: Calculate value according to service level. Is used to make reporting on cases and measure Service Level
CustomField.formula: IF(ISPICKVAL(Status, "Closed"), IF(( ClosedDate -Close_Date_Time_Objective__c)* 24 <= 0,"Service Level Agreements",IF(AND((ClosedDate -Close_Date_Time_Objective__c) * 24 > 0,(ClosedDate -Close_Date_Time_Objective__c) * 24 <=48),"48H After The Deadline","Level Of Service Alert")), IF((NOW()-Close_Date_Time_Objective__c)* 24 <= 0,"Service Level Agreements",IF(AND((NOW()-Close_Date_Time_Objective__c) * 24 > 0,(NOW()-Close_Date_Time_Objective__c) * 24 <=48),"48H After The Deadline","Level Of Service Alert")))
CustomField.label: Overdue
